title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Japanese Derby, after
numerous ideal sessions of training, Mejiro Bright
heads off to the track in high spirits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, however, Silence Suzuka
flounders, unsure of how she should run in the
race that's about to start.
